themes.description: Exposure tied to AI compute, semiconductors, data centers, and enabling infrastructure.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may increase sensitivity to AI capex cycles and semiconductor supply shocks.
themes.advisor_description: Use when explaining how much of the portfolio is connected to the AI buildout.

themes.description: Exposure likely to react to changes in rates, duration, credit spreads, or financing conditions.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter more in rate-shock and refinancing-stress discussions.
themes.advisor_description: Use when framing where the portfolio may be most exposed to rate moves.

themes.description: Exposure to private, opaque, stale-marked, or slower-liquidity assets.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may reduce near-term flexibility and increase reliance on confidence caveats.
themes.advisor_description: Use when discussing liquidity, valuation confidence, or private-market stress.

themes.description: Exposure tied to power, energy supply, real assets, and energy bottlenecks.
themes.exposure_direction_notes: Higher exposure may matter in energy-shock or infrastructure-resilience conversations.
themes.advisor_description: Use when connecting energy supply conditions to portfolio exposures.
